title: Best Day Ever
description: Grandma Kelly and Pa realize it was the perfect family day: the entire field was mowed, dinner was cooked, and everyone got to spend time together.
alt: Grandma Kelly and Pa relax in lawn chairs at sunset while Dad grills burgers nearby, Mom rests in scrubs, and the grandkids play in a huge freshly mowed field. Grandma Kelly thinks, 'He mowed the entire field, made dinner, AND we spent time with family... Best Day Ever!'
